hero-paragraph: I'm a <bold>Software Engineer</bold> who gets the job done. Currently, I'm focused on <skill>Full-stack</skill> Web Development.

about-me.title: About me
about-me.intro-paragraph-1: I am a Software Engineer with experience in building full-stack solutions, APIs, and microservices using React/Next.js/Vue.js on the frontend and Node.js/Python on the backend. I also have hands-on experience with DevOps tooling, cloud infrastructure, and AI-powered features, including LLM integrations and agentic workflows.
about-me.intro-paragraph-2: Actively expanding my backend skills with other technologies, such as Go, to complement my Node.js/Python experience.
about-me.intro-paragraph-3: I am open to opportunities where I can contribute my skills and grow professionally in a dynamic tech environment.

projects.title: My Latest Projects
projects.summary: A collection of personal projects I’ve built or am currently working on.
projects.toki: A web application designed to help users track issues efficiently. It allows users to log issues, update their status, and store the necessary details.
projects.pokedex: A Pokédex web application built with Vue.js that allows users to browse, search, and view detailed information about various Pokémon, including their stats and abilities.
projects.graphs: Single page React application that allows users to create graph structures, export the canvas as a png image and check the correctness of coloring.

boataround.description: ● Developed reusable Vue.js components and migrated parts of the yacht rental platform from Vue.js (JavaScript) to React (TypeScript), improving maintainability and performance. ● Optimized MongoDB aggregation pipelines in Node.js for multilingual SEO template generation across thousands of pages. ● Implemented Node.js REST API endpoints for an automated email reply service (booking confirmations, reminders). ● Conducted frontend A/B testing on critical user flows (payment, search, boat detail page) to refine website features.

freelance.description: ● Expanded an Australian English-testing platform (4,500+ active users) by building practice modules in Vue.js, extending scoring logic, resolving Firebase auth and Stripe payment integration issues, and improving the Python Django backend. ● Developed an MVP for an AI-powered search visibility platform using Next.js, implementing prompt categorization, source scoring, and a LangChain-based RAG pipeline to analyze brand visibility across LLMs. ● Built an automated SEO analysis system using Crawlee for web crawling, BullMQ for async job queues, and tRPC for API layer, with Puppeteer-powered PDF report generation and interactive dashboard UI. ● Contributed to development of an orchestration framework by implementing React components for the UI component library, developing FastAPI services, and improving pytest test coverage from ~60% to ~90%. ● Modernized a date and time utility website by migrating the frontend from Bootstrap to Bulma CSS based on new Figma designs, adding JavaScript interactions, building new pages, and extending the Python Flask backend.

promiseo.description: ● Collaborated on 4 client websites for small to mid-size businesses/government agencies across Slovakia, Hungary and Czechia — converting Adobe XD/Figma designs into web pages using HTML, CSS/SCSS, JavaScript and Vue.js. ● Built a Python scraping tool (BeautifulSoup + Requests) to migrate legacy content, perform data cleaning and extract 1,000+ media assets and multilingual text articles for a client's website migration.
